case_title: FUTURE WORKS UNLIMITED, INC. VS. PROWEST MEDIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FUTURE WORKS UNLIMITED, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PROWEST MEDIA CORPORATION $18,986.00 PRINCIPAL, $1,509.78 INTEREST, $330.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $20,825.78, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION

APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF FUTURE WORKS UNLIMITED, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT PROWEST MEDIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-18-2010 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT PROWEST MEDIA CORPORATION'S MOTION TO VACATE SISTER STATE JUDGMENT IS DENIED; DEFENDANT HAS NOT SHOWN THAT SUBSTITUTE SERVICE WAS INVALID OR THAT THE NEW JERSEY COURT DID NOT ACQUIRE JURISDICTION OVER IT. OPPOSING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: JOYCE D. LONG, CSR # 8620

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Vacate Sister State Judgment
Off Calendar May-18-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT PROWEST MEDIA CORPORATION'S Motion To Vacate Sister State Judgment IS DENIED; DEFENDANT HAS NOT SHOWN THAT SUBSTITUTE SERVICE WAS INVALID OR THAT THE NEW JERSEY COURT DID NOT ACQUIRE JURISDICTION OVER IT. Opposing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Joyce D. Long, CSR # 8620 =301/PJB
